subcodes.title: Words to departing pilgrims, spoken on 1915-04-26
subcodes.first_line: Intoxicated with the wine of the love of God and the service of man, you must go forth with intensified faith and focalized attraction. Each one of you must become a storm center of spiritual influence and a whirling vortex of divine stimuli.
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @The Holy Spirit, @methods of teaching the Cause, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @power of love, @love of God, @serving humanity; working for progress, betterment of the world
